artifacts.summary: 7-phase plan to extract the Hilbert hierarchy foundation layer as a chain of 5-6 small PRs (each <500 diff lines) to upstream CSLib, preceded by Zulip topic creation and followed by state management updates

memory_candidates.content: When contributing to upstream open-source Lean 4 projects as a new contributor (especially with AI involvement), PRs must be kept under 500 diff lines. A monolithic PR with many new files should be decomposed into a sequential chain where each PR introduces one dependency layer. The chain order follows the import dependency graph: connective typeclasses -> axiom definitions -> proof system hierarchy -> concrete instances -> theorems -> metalogic. Create a Zulip topic BEFORE the first PR. Each PR needs AI disclosure, literature references cited in code, and full CI verification.
